FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.30sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7fbf759831a0>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'test_username': 'testuser', 'user_list': [{'active_time': '2026-05-11T14:18:04Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-05-11T14:16:19Z', 'email': '', ...}]}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

.venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:915: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

user_list = [{'active_time': '2026-05-11T14:18:04Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-05-11T14:16:19Z', 'email': '', ...}]
test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert expected in usernames, (
            f"Test user {expected!r} (from {test_username!r}) not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )
E       AssertionError: Test user 'testuser' (from 'testuser') not found in user list: ['__bootstrap_admin__']
E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

2026/05/11 14:19:48.478307379 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478315902 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478347159 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478360249 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478361200 {
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478370734 initPSandPDFfonts()

2026/05/11 14:19:48.478380519 if (!missing(width))
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478380940 new$width <- width

2026/05/11 14:19:48.478438066 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478449413 if (!missing(version))
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478449844 new$version <- version
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478459078 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478459598 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478468372 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478468842 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478478227 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478478657 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478490926 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478491617 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478500681 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478512418 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478513109 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478528102 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478528983 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478548372 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478548833 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478558498 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478558938 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478568563 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478568994 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478583205 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478584066 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478598408 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478632619 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478633511 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478648143 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478648614 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478658729 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478659170 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478679370 "default"))
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478680081 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478694182 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478694933 }
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478709405 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478710347 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478727422 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478727873 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478737307 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478737748 }
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478751689 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478752400 }
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478811129 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478811760 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478828385 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478829096 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478846612 domain = NA)
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478847353 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478882507 }
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478894485 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478895226 old$family <- family
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478908335 }
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478908766 version <- old$version

2026/05/11 14:19:48.478923939 "2.0")
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478935677 if (version %in% versions)
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478945331 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478946253 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478957239 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478959833 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478980154 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478981396 domain = NA)
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478996849 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478997560 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/05/11 14:19:48.479025472 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/05/11 14:19:48.479026363 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,

2026/05/11 14:19:48.479047345 invisible()

2026/05/11 14:19:48.478307379 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478315902 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478347159 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478360249 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478361200 {
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478370734 initPSandPDFfonts()

2026/05/11 14:19:48.478380519 if (!missing(width))
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478380940 new$width <- width

2026/05/11 14:19:48.478438066 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478449413 if (!missing(version))
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478449844 new$version <- version
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478459078 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478459598 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478468372 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478468842 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478478227 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478478657 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478490926 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478491617 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478500681 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478512418 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478513109 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478528102 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478528983 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478548372 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478548833 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478558498 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478558938 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478568563 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478568994 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478583205 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478584066 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478598408 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478632619 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478633511 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478648143 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478648614 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478658729 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478659170 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478679370 "default"))
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478680081 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478694182 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478694933 }
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478709405 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478710347 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478727422 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478727873 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478737307 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478737748 }
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478751689 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478752400 }
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478811129 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478811760 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478828385 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478829096 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478846612 domain = NA)
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478847353 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478882507 }
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478894485 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478895226 old$family <- family
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478908335 }
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478908766 version <- old$version

2026/05/11 14:19:48.478923939 "2.0")
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478935677 if (version %in% versions)
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478945331 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478946253 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478957239 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478959833 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478980154 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478981396 domain = NA)
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478996849 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/05/11 14:19:48.478997560 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/05/11 14:19:48.479025472 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/05/11 14:19:48.479026363 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,

2026/05/11 14:19:48.479047345 invisible()
